plan.title: Pinned OSS evidence
plan.summary: siyuan-note/siyuan is referenced by advisory, release, and patch commit metadata.

plan.title: Electron hardening boundary
plan.summary: Official advisory fixes must still be reviewed against Electron runtime hardening.

coverageGaps.title: Production monitoring evidence
coverageGaps.summary: The OSS case verifies code-level remediation, not the maintainer's deployed monitoring.
coverageGaps.recommendation: Require release, logging, metric, and alert evidence in the consuming project.

userDecisions.title: Electron runtime risk acceptance
userDecisions.summary: Maintainers must decide whether any remaining Node-enabled renderer surface is acceptable.
userDecisions.recommendation: Prefer nodeIntegration=false, contextIsolation=true, webSecurity=true, and narrow preload IPC.

warnings.name: Production evidence for OSS case
warnings.summary: The case proves the code review signal, but deployment monitoring and release approval remain project-specific evidence.

coverageGaps.name: Production evidence for OSS case
coverageGaps.summary: The case proves the code review signal, but deployment monitoring and release approval remain project-specific evidence.

checks.name: Electron runtime hardening
checks.summary: APM hardening pass: dangerous Electron settings are not present in the reviewed renderer baseline.
